coreJobStatement: Enable safe, reliable, energy-efficient vertical transport of people and goods within multi-story structures
productJobStatement: Help Guide Rail System to constrain cabin and counterweight lateral movement with dimensional accuracy, wear resistance, and installation traceability within elevator hoistways
anchorLevel: L4 (Steel guide rail profile body within L5 Guide Rail System under L6b Hoistway Components Manufacturing)

segments.name: High-rise commercial
segments.characteristics: >10 floors, >2.5 m/s, high traffic, EN 81-20 full scope
segments.targetabilityReason: IT8 cold-drawn rail mandatory; tightest straightness tolerance
segments.circumstance: >10 floors, >2.5 m/s, high traffic, EN 81-20 full scope

segments.name: Standard residential
segments.targetabilityReason: Hot-rolled + machined acceptable; cold-drawn premium often not justified

segments.name: Freight / industrial
segments.characteristics: Heavy loads, high duty-cycle, larger cabin
segments.targetabilityReason: Oversized or reinforced section; lower speed tolerance
segments.circumstance: Heavy loads, high duty-cycle, larger cabin

segments.name: Retrofit / modernization
segments.characteristics: Existing hoistway, constrained bracket spacing, replace-in-place
segments.targetabilityReason: Tolerance determines fit to legacy bracket positions; custom section common
segments.circumstance: Existing hoistway, constrained bracket spacing, replace-in-place

segments.name: Premium / specialty
segments.characteristics: Hospital, cleanroom, luxury residential - vibration and surface quality critical
segments.targetabilityReason: Cold-drawn + IH mandated; A95 vibration limit critical
segments.circumstance: Hospital, cleanroom, luxury residential - vibration and surface quality critical

alternatives.name: Cold-drawn precision T-section (ZOLLERN position)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Higher unit cost; 6m max bar length; 6-12 week die lead time for new sizes; IT8 tolerance and IH available. ~40% share.

alternatives.name: Hot-rolled + post-machined T-section (ArcelorMittal, voestalpine)
alternatives.tradeoffs: +-0.5 mm tolerance without machining step; no integrated surface hardening; secondary machining cost; dominant for standard/freight. ~45% share.

alternatives.name: Cold-formed hollow steel section (MONTEFERRO, Zhangjiagang Mofeel)
alternatives.tradeoffs: ~20% material saving; lower cross-section inertia limits speed; non-standard guide shoe compatibility; mainly low/mid-rise. ~10% share.

alternatives.name: Stainless / aluminium special rail
alternatives.tradeoffs: Corrosion advantage; lower strength limits load rating; aluminium not hardenable; premium pricing; niche residential/light-duty. ~4% share.

alternatives.name: Machined from solid bar (legacy / repair)
alternatives.tradeoffs: 60-80% material waste; highest per-unit cost; no near-net geometry; long lead time; declining share. ~5% share.
